# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Authentication Plugin
Description: A WordPress plugin for user authentication with password hashing.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

// Register the user table
function create_user_table() {
    global $wpdb;
    $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'users';
    $charset = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
    $sql = "CREATE TABLE $table_name (
        ID INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
        username VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
        password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
        email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE
    ) $charset;";
    require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
    dbDelta($sql);
}
register_activation_hook(__FILE__, 'create_user_table');

// Register the user registration form
function user_registration_form() {
    ?>
    <form action="<?php echo admin_url('admin-post.php'); ?>" method="post">
        <label for="username">Username:</label>
        <input type="text" name="username" id="username" required>
        <label for="password">Password:</label>
        <input type="password" name="password" id="password" required>
        <label for="email">Email:</label>
        <input type="email" name="email" id="email" required>
        <input type="submit" name="register" value="Register">
    </form>
    <?php
}
add_shortcode('user_registration', 'user_registration_form');

// Register the user login form
function user_login_form() {
    ?>
    <form action="<?php echo admin_url('admin-post.php'); ?>" method="post">
        <label for="username">Username:</label>
        <input type="text" name="username" id="username" required>
        <label for="password">Password:</label>
        <input type="password" name="password" id="password" required>
        <input type="submit" name="login" value="Login">
    </form>
    <?php
}
add_shortcode('user_login', 'user_login_form');

// Handle user registration
function user_registration() {
    global $wpdb;
    $username = sanitize_text_field($_POST['username']);
    $password = sanitize_text_field($_POST['password']);
    $email = sanitize_email($_POST['email']);
    $hashed_password = password_hash($password, PASSWORD_BCRYPT);
    $wpdb->insert($wpdb->prefix . 'users', array(
        'username' => $username,
        'password' => $hashed_password,
        'email' => $email
    ));
}
add_action('admin_post_register', 'user_registration');

// Handle user login
function user_login() {
    global $wpdb;
    $username = sanitize_text_field($_POST['username']);
    $password = sanitize_text_field($_POST['password']);
    $user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}users WHERE username = %s", $username));
    if ($user && password_verify($password, $user->password)) {
        // Set user session and redirect to dashboard
    } else {
        // Display error message
    }
}
add_action('admin_post_login', 'user_login');
